restaurant.name: Bistro Elegante
restaurant.description: Modern dining experience with locally sourced ingredients and expert craftsmanship

categories.name: Starters
categories.description: Light beginnings to awaken your palate

items.name: Tomato Bruschetta
items.description: Toasted artisanal bread topped with heirloom tomatoes, fresh basil, garlic, and extra virgin olive oil
items.chefNote: Our tomatoes are sourced from local organic farms and picked at peak ripeness.

items.name: Crispy Calamari
items.description: Lightly fried squid rings served with spicy marinara and lemon aioli
items.chefNote: We use rice flour for a lighter, crispier coating that stays crunchy longer.

categories.name: Main Courses
categories.description: Hearty dishes that tell a story

items.name: Pan-Seared Salmon
items.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon seared to perfection, served with seasonal vegetables and lemon butter sauce
items.chefNote: We source our salmon daily from sustainable fisheries for the freshest flavor.

items.name: Truffle Mushroom Pasta
items.description: Handmade fettuccine with wild mushrooms, black truffle, and Parmesan cream sauce
items.chefNote: Our pasta is made fresh daily using organic semolina flour and free-range eggs.

items.name: Grilled Ribeye Steak
items.description: Prime ribeye with roasted potatoes, seasonal vegetables, and herb butter
items.chefNote: Dry-aged for 28 days to enhance flavor and tenderness.

items.name: Classic Tiramisu
items.description: Coffee-soaked ladyfingers layered with mascarpone cream and cocoa
items.chefNote: We use organic espresso and free-range eggs for a rich, authentic flavor.

items.name: Flourless Chocolate Cake
items.description: Rich dark chocolate cake with raspberry coulis and vanilla ice cream
items.chefNote: Perfect for chocolate lovers - intense, rich, and completely gluten-free.

items.name: Elegante Spritz
items.description: Prosecco, Aperol, soda water, and fresh citrus
items.chefNote: Our signature cocktail - refreshing and perfect for any occasion.

items.name: Berry Bliss
items.description: Mixed berries, lime, and mint with sparkling water
items.chefNote: A refreshing alcohol-free option bursting with fresh berry flavors.

events.title: Wine Pairing Dinner
events.description: Five-course meal expertly paired with selected wines from our sommelier. Each course is designed to complement the wine selections, creating a harmonious dining experience.

events.title: Live Jazz Nights
events.description: Enjoy smooth jazz performances while dining in our elegant atmosphere. Featuring local jazz artists and a special late-night menu.

events.title: Pasta Making Workshop
events.description: Hands-on cooking class where you'll learn to make fresh pasta from scratch with our executive chef. Includes dinner with wine pairing.

testimonials.text: The most memorable dining experience we've had this year. Every dish was a masterpiece, and the service was impeccable.
testimonials.author: Sarah Johnson

testimonials.text: Perfect for our anniversary dinner. The ambiance, food, and attention to detail made it a night we'll never forget.
testimonials.author: Michael Chen

testimonials.text: As a vegetarian, I'm always impressed by their creative plant-based options. The truffle mushroom pasta is divine!
testimonials.author: Emily Rodriguez

team.name: Marco Giovanni
team.bio: With over 20 years of culinary experience spanning Michelin-starred restaurants in Europe and innovative farm-to-table concepts in California, Chef Marco brings a unique perspective to every dish.

team.name: Anna Rodriguez
team.bio: With a background in pastry and a passion for Latin flavors, Anna brings creativity and precision to our kitchen.

team.name: David Chen
team.bio: David ensures every guest receives exceptional service and that operations run smoothly from open to close.
